name: @defen.so/init
description: One command to install a production Web Application Firewall in any framework. Detects Node / PHP / Python / Ruby / Go / Rust / Java / .NET, installs the right Defenso SDK, wires the middleware, writes DEFENSO_TOKEN to .env. Free forever tier. Fails open. Playground + MCP for Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf included.
author: Defenso (Next Lab LLC) <info@defen.so> (https://defen.so)
